input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.1.5
            TITLE: a single brake acting on a limited slip differential may be used

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.1.5: A single brake acting on a limited slip differential may be used
T.3.1.5 A single brake acting on a limited slip differential may be used

final_answer: A single brake acting on a limited slip differential may be used
